scripts.comp:lang: npm run comp:core && npm run -w packages/pb-lang-support compile
scripts.comp:pbp: npm run comp:core && npm -w packages/pb-project-files run compile
scripts.comp: npm run comp:core && npm run comp:lang && npm run comp:forms && npm run comp:pbp
scripts.vsix:lang: npm run comp:core && npm -w packages/pb-lang-support run compile && cd packages/pb-lang-support && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o ../../pb-lang-support.vsix
scripts.vsix:forms: npm run comp:core && npm -w packages/pb-forms-editor run compile && cd packages/pb-forms-editor && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o ../../pb-forms-editor.vsix
scripts.vsix:pbp: npm run comp:core && cd packages/pb-project-files && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o ../../pb-project-files.vsix
scripts.vsix: npm run vsix:lang && npm run vsix:forms && npm run vsix:pbp
scripts.ver:patch:lang: npm version patch -w packages/pb-lang-support --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:patch
scripts.ver:patch:forms: npm version patch -w packages/pb-forms-editor --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:patch
scripts.ver:patch:pbp: npm version patch -w packages/pb-project-files --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:patch
scripts.ver:patch:core: npm version patch -w packages/pb-project-core --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:patch
scripts.ver:minor:lang: npm version minor -w packages/pb-lang-support --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:minor
scripts.ver:minor:forms: npm version minor -w packages/pb-forms-editor --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:minor
scripts.ver:minor:pbp: npm version minor -w packages/pb-project-files --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:minor
scripts.ver:minor:core: npm version minor -w packages/pb-project-core --no-git-tag-version && npm run ver:minor
